data.title: Bitcoin's early whale transferred 10,000 BTC after 14 years of silence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, an old Bitcoin wallet that has been silent for more than 14 years has just transferred out 10,000 BTC, which is about 1.09 billion US dollars at the current price. The wallet initially purchased Bitcoin at a price of only 0.78 US dollars. This transfer is equivalent to a return of about 140,000 times.

data.title: Trump plans to impose tariffs of up to 70% on some countries, effective August 1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest public statement, US President Trump plans to impose tariffs of varying proportions on different countries, ranging from 10%-20% to 60%-70%. data.title: Amber International raises $25.5 million to fuel $100 million crypto reserve strategy
data.description:
The Nasdaq-listed firm said it plans to use the proceeds to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched earlier this year.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/361046/amber-international-26-million-raise-crypto-reserve?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Amber International Completes $25.5 Million Private Funding to Advance $100 Million Crypto Reserve Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Amber International, a listed subsidiary of Amber Group, announced the completion of a $25.5 million private placement financing, with investors including Pantera Capital, CMAG Funds and other institutions. The funds will be used to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched in May, aimed at promoting the long-term development of the ecosystem and product innovation. Currently, its reserve assets have covered BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP and SUI, focusing on the layout of RWA asset tokenization and AgentFi. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $602 million yesterday, with Fidelity ETF FBTC leading the way with a net inflow of $237 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 3, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$602 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$237 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$12.209 billion.
The second is Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$225 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$52.646 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$137.597 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 6.29%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$49.642 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$149 million yesterday, and Grayscale ETHE alone had a net outflow of US$5.3548 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 3, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$149 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$85.3849 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$5.616 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$64.6466 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.739 billion.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of US$5.3548 million. Currently, ETHE's total net outflow has reached US$4.30 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$10.826 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.45%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$4.398 billion.

data.title: This week's mining data highlights: Bitcoin price breaks through the 110,000 mark; Bitcoin mining company Bit Digital raises $150 million to buy ETH and will withdraw from BTC mining later
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News, Week 26, 2025 (June 27-July 3):
1. According to cloverpool, the average computing power of the entire Bitcoin network is 860 EH/s, the highest is 995 EH/s, and the lowest is 723 EH/s, which is 3.77% higher than the average computing power last week (829 EH/s).
2. According to cloverpool, the block height 903,168 was produced at 13:23:16 on June 29, with an average block production time of 9 minutes and 26 seconds, and the mining difficulty is 116.96 T, which is 7.48% lower than the previous adjustment cycle.
3. According to blockchain.com, the average price of Bitcoin is US$107,356, the highest is US$110,590, and the lowest is US$105,120, which is 2.94% higher than the average price last week (US$104,287).
4. Mining news worth noting include:
(1) Bitcoin mining company Bit Digital raised $150 million to purchase ETH and will withdraw from BTC mining later;
(2) French listed company Crypto Blockchain Industries announced that it will implement a non-dilutive shareholder loan of up to 20 million euros (about 23.4 million US dollars), and the proceeds will be used to purchase Bitcoin and mining equipment.
(3) US listed company NIP Group (NASDAQ: NIPG) announced its entry into the Bitcoin mining field. NIP Group has signed a final asset purchase agreement to acquire cryptocurrency mining machines from Fortune Peak Limited and Apex Cyber ​​Capital Limited for Bitcoin mining, with a total computing power of 3.11 EH/s and an estimated monthly output of about 60 Bitcoins. At present, NIP Group has established a dedicated digital computing department to manage the operation of the acquired products.
Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Wallet Activated After 14 Years
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a Bitcoin address containing 10,000 BTC, valued at approximately $1,092,973,486, has been activated after being dormant for 14.3 years. In 2011, the value of this Bitcoin was merely $7,793. The activation of such a long-dormant wallet has drawn significant attention from the cryptocurrency community, highlighting the potential for substantial value changes over time.

data.title: Detroit Sues Crypto Real Estate Platform Over Safety, Health Violations
data.description:
The city alleges the asset tokenization platform left hundreds of properties in disrepair, even as it promised significant returns.
source: https://decrypt.co/328586/detroit-sues-crypto-real-estate-platform-safety-health-violations

data.title: Detroit Sues Real Token Over Property Management Issues
data.description: According to PANews, Detroit has filed a lawsuit against the cryptocurrency real estate platform Real Token and its 165 affiliated limited liability companies. This legal action is described as the largest nuisance abatement lawsuit to date. The lawsuit alleges that the blockchain-based real estate investment platform has failed to meet health and safety standards for the 400 properties it manages, putting tenants at risk. It is reported that tenants in over 400 properties lack heating, water, or functional shower facilities. Detroit is seeking a court order to compel the platform's founders to carry out necessary repairs, establish a rent escrow account, and hold them personally accountable.
